description:
Split-out from fz-ul4.11.4. Core AST -> fz-IR lowering covering enough to run fixtures end-to-end through .11.5 (IR interp).

## In scope

- Expr: Int/Float/Str/Atom/Bool/Nil literals, Var, BinOp, UnOp, Block, If (with optional else), Match (single-pattern in expr context), List ([a,b|t] cascades), Tuple (AllocStruct with tuple-of-arity-N schema), Call, Lambda (closure alloc).
- Tail-position detection -> Term::TailCall vs Term::Call.
- Non-tail Call lowers to CPS-split: current fn closes with Term::Call{callee, args, continuation: Cont{fn_id, captured}}, fresh continuation FnIr begins with the call's return value as its first param plus captured locals.
- captured = all in-scope locals at call site (conservative; .11.6 liveness narrows later).
- Multi-clause fn dispatch: cascade of try-blocks, each tests its clause's patterns; on fail, Goto next try-block; on success, run body.
- Patterns: Wildcard, Var, Int/Float/Str/Atom/Bool/Nil literals, Tuple, List ([a,b|rest]), As(name, pat).
- Const variants: add Float(f64), Str(String) to fz_ir::Const.
- Prim variants: add MakeTuple(Vec<Var>), MakeList(Vec<Var>, Option<Var>), MakeClosure(FnId, Vec<Var>) — keep AllocStruct/ListCons existing.
- BuiltinId table seeded with: print, assert, assert_eq, assert_neq.
- LowerError type with variants: Unsupported(String), Unbound(String), ArityMismatch{name, expected, got}.

## Out of scope (-> fz-ul4.11.4b)

- Case, Cond, With.
- Map, MapUpdate, Index expressions.
- Map patterns.
- Bitstring expressions and patterns.
- VecLit (all VecKinds).
- Quote/Unquote (these should already be macro-expanded; emit LowerError if reached).

## Tests

- Each Expr variant: lower a tiny program, snapshot pretty-print or assert specific Term/Prim shapes.
- CPS-split: \`fn f(x), do: g(x) + 1\` produces 2 IR fns (entry and continuation k0); continuation receives g's result + captured x.
- Multi-clause fact(0)/fact(n) dispatches via if-cascade.
- Tail-position calls use TailCall.
- Pattern destructuring: Tuple({a, b}) projects fields, binds a and b.

## UNBLOCKS

- fz-ul4.11.4b (rest of variants)
- fz-ul4.11.5 (IR interpreter -- core IR is enough for first cut)
title: AST -> fz-IR translator (core)
